Class Session

java.lang.Object
iu.session.Session
All Implemented Interfaces:
IuSession
class Session extends Object implements IuSession
IuSession implementation

  • Constructor Details

    • Session

      Session(URI resourceUri, IuSessionConfiguration configuration)
      New session constructor.
      Parameters:
      resourceUri - root protected resource URI
      configuration - session configuration

    • Session

      Session(URI resourceUri, String token, WebKey secretKey, IuSessionConfiguration configuration)
      Session token constructor.
      Parameters:
      resourceUri - root protected resource URI
      token - tokenized session
      secretKey - secret key to use for detokenizing the session.
      configuration - session configuration

  • Method Details

    • tokenize

      String tokenize(WebKey secretKey, IuSessionConfiguration configuration)
      Tokenize this session.
      Parameters:
      secretKey - secret key
      configuration - session configuration
      Returns:
      tokenized session

      Gets whether session object state change
